name: Kazan Delicacies — Halal Product Catalog Feed
description: Machine-readable feed of 77 halal SKUs (sausages, pepperoni, kazylyk, ham, Tatar pastries) from Kazan Delicacies LLC. Compatible with Google Merchant Center, OpenAI Commerce, Bing Shopping, Perplexity Shopping.

item.name: Halal "Beef" Sausages (80g × 6 pcs) — Kazan Delicacies
item.description: Professional "Beef" sausages tailored for HORECA and gourmet hot dogs. These heat-stable sausages do not shrink and perfectly retain their shape during cooking. With a firm texture and a rich spice profile (cardamom, black pepper), they serve as a premium alternative to traditional savory meat links. Ingredients: high-quality beef, poultry, natural spices. Skinless, GMO-free. Shelf life: 360 days at –18°C. HALAL certified #614A/2024 (DUM RT). HACCP & ISO 22000. 100% pork-free. Wholesale from Kazan (Tatarstan, Russia). EXW Kazan / DC Lyubertsy.
item.category: Frozen Products > Grill Sausages for Hot Dogs > Halal "Beef" Sausages (80g × 6 pcs) — Kazan Delicacies

issuedBy.name: Muslim Spiritual Board of the Republic of Tatarstan (DUM RT)

item.name: Halal Turkey and Chicken Sausages (80 g × 6 pcs) — Kazan Delicacies
item.description: Hot Dog and HORECA Sausages (6 pcs, 480 g) - thermostable Professional Turkey and Chicken Sausages for Hot Dogs, Breakfasts, and Grills. Professional Turkey and Chicken Sausages are a versatile solution for HORECA, grill bars, and hot dogs. The balance of rich turkey and tender chicken creates a soft texture and delicate flavor. Thanks to the thermostable formulation, the sausages are resistant to frying and grilling, and retain their juiciness and shape. Aroma: meaty with notes of nutmeg and cardamom. Taste: balanced, less fatty, with a firm casing and juicy crumb. Suitable for hot dogs, breakfasts, and grill menus. HALAL certified #614A/2024 (DUM RT). HACCP & ISO 22000. 100% pork-free. Wholesale from Kazan (Tatarstan, Russia). EXW Kazan / DC Lyubertsy.
item.category: Frozen Products > Grill Sausages for Hot Dogs > Halal Turkey and Chicken Sausages (80 g × 6 pcs) — Kazan Delicacies

issuedBy.name: Muslim Spiritual Board of the Republic of Tatarstan (DUM RT)

item.name: Halal Sausages with Gouda cheese and a mixture of three peppers (80 g × 6 pcs) — Kazan Delicacies
item.description: Sausages for hot dogs and HORECA (6 pcs, 480 g) — thermostable Spicy meat sausages with cheese and spices for hot dogs and grilling. Professional sausages with Gouda cheese and a mixture of three peppers (black, white, and red) — a bright solution for HORECA, grill menus, and hot dogs. The spicy, but not too hot, flavor enhances the meat base, while the cheese adds softness and a slight sweetness. The aroma is spicy, with mild pepper notes and a hint of cheese sweetness. The taste is savory, well-balanced, and has a vibrant spicy flavor. These dogs are perfect for hot dogs, grilling, and serving with side dishes like sauerkraut, pickled vegetables, and spicy sauces. HALAL certified #614A/2024 (DUM RT). HACCP & ISO 22000. 100% pork-free. Wholesale from Kazan (Tatarstan, Russia). EXW Kazan / DC Lyubertsy.
item.category: Frozen Products > Grill Sausages for Hot Dogs > Halal Sausages with Gouda cheese and a mixture of three peppers (80 g × 6 pcs) — Kazan Delicacies
